title: Bowling Green, KY — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bowling Green, KY: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bowling Green is a city in KY with a population of 72,000. Home of Western Kentucky University and the Corvette Museum with a growing manufacturing base.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
